sections.paragraph:
περιδέω aor. 3 sg. περιέδησε Job 12:18. Pass.: aor. inf. περιδεθῆναι (TestSol); plpf. 3 sg. περιεδέδετο (Hdt., Aristoph. et al.; SIG 1168, 62; TestSol 15:5) bind/wrap around τί τινι someth. w. someth. (Plut., Mor. 825e; Job 12:18) ἡ ὄψις αὐτοῦ σουδαρίῳ π. his face was wrapped in a cloth J 11:44.—DELG s.v. 1 δέω. M-M.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. sg. = singular

inf. inf. = infinitive

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

plpf. plpf. = pluperfect

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

someth. someth. = something

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 800
